name: construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously, inefficient maintenance scheduling causes equipment downtime. We automate scheduling and tracking instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and phone calls.
problem_solved: Difficulty in scheduling and tracking routine equipment maintenance across multiple job sites.
